title: T-068 — add `import 'server-only'` marker on PostHog flags route (FT-008)
prompt:
# T-068 — add `import 'server-only'` marker on PostHog flags route (FT-008)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-008** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (XS effort)

## Goal
Add `import 'server-only'` at the top of the flags route and add a unit test that asserts importing the module from a client context throws.

## Implementation contract
1. First line of apps/web/app/api/flags/route.ts: `import 'server-only';`.
2. Vitest test uses esbuild --conditions=browser to verify the import throws.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/flags/route.ts [modify]
- apps/web/app/api/flags/__tests__/server-only-guard.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the flags route source, when scanned, then the first import statement is `import 'server-only';`.
2. Given a vitest test importing the route under a browser-condition resolver, when run, then the import throws with 'This module cannot be imported from a Client Component module'.
3. Given the existing flags route happy path, when called from a Server Component, then it returns the same response shape it did before.

## Test strategy
- RED: write server-only-guard.test.ts asserting the import-from-browser-conditions throws before the marker is added.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run server-only-guard`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not remove the marker once added.
- Do not export anything from this route file that should remain server-only.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add `import 'server-only'` marker on the PostHog flags route to prevent accidental client-bundle inclusion of POSTHOG_API_KEY.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-033 shipped the flags route without the `server-only` marker. If a future commit imports something from this module into a client component, the secret will leak into the client bundle. Add the marker plus a build-time test that fails the route when imported from a client component.
out_of_scope: Do not change flags route response shape.
acceptance_criteria: Given the flags route source, when scanned, then the first import statement is `import 'server-only';`.
Given a vitest test importing the route under a browser-condition resolver, when run, then the import throws with 'This module cannot be imported from a Client Component module'.
Given the existing flags route happy path, when called from a Server Component, then it returns the same response shape it did before.
test_strategy: RED: write server-only-guard.test.ts asserting the import-from-browser-conditions throws before the marker is added.
risk_red_lines: Do not remove the marker once added.
Do not export anything from this route file that should remain server-only.
